description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/gluttton/munkres-cpp and defines a single stage called test. Add a test_job in the test stage that first runs a before_script to set BUILD_DIR=`pwd`/build, creates the directory with mkdir -p ${BUILD_DIR}, changes into it (cd ${BUILD_DIR}), runs cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug ${BUILD_DIR}/.. and then make to build the project. Then the script executes ./test/bronkerbosch_test followed by make coverage to run the unit tests and generate coverage. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
